personal.preferred_title: AWS Data Engineer / AI Pipeline Engineer

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience spanning Python, SQL, ETL/ELT pipelines, data quality, governance-minded data delivery, and production support in regulated financial services environments. Strong background building AWS data pipelines, PySpark/Spark processing, operational reporting, telemetry analytics, and reliability-focused data products used by technical and business stakeholders. Recent project work includes RAG-style retrieval, vector embeddings, agentic AI workflows, MCP-enabled automation, and AI-assisted data pipeline quality gates, positioning me to support Kyndryl's Agentic AI data infrastructure while keeping the core value anchored in robust data engineering.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and operated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable data workflows supporting capacity, forecasting, and executive reporting.

Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL concepts, Redshift workloads, and optimized schemas to support governed analytics, historical retention, and production reporting needs.

Implemented validation, reconciliation, and data quality practices across telemetry feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics, improving trust in downstream analytics and operational decisions.
Developed ML forecasting workflows with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks months ahead, connecting data engineering outputs to AI/ML-driven planning use cases.
Created dashboards and reporting layers with Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly to expose trends, anomalies, and utilization insights to senior stakeholders.
Supported production reliability through monitoring, troubleshooting, incident response, documentation, and runbook-style operational practices in a regulated banking environment.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems, using telemetry to identify performance issues and support operational reliability.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic monitoring data to generate actionable optimization recommendations for engineering and business stakeholders.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile journeys, strengthening observability and root-cause analysis capabilities.
Participated in AWS migration planning and evaluated monitoring readiness for cloud-based environments.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services client, supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and thousands of instrumented agents across enterprise applications.
Built Perl/Korn shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual exports and improving repeatability of operational analytics.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules used to standardize monitoring and improve issue detection.
Delivered technical documentation, training, and mentoring to support consistent adoption of observability practices across teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while maintaining transaction performance and data integrity.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation utilities to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Optimized SQL and database access patterns to reduce physical hardware footprint while supporting high-volume processing requirements.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, JSON, XML
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data modeling, data warehousing, data lakes, data validation, reconciliation, metadata concepts, data lineage concepts, documentation, production support
skills.AI Data Workflows: RAG concepts, vector embeddings, sentence-transformers, FAISS, LLM API integration, agentic workflow orchestration, MCP concepts, AI-assisted development, quality gates for generated artifacts
skills.Cloud & Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts; Azure/GCP awareness; Databricks, Delta Lake, dbt, Snowflake, Iceberg as self-studied or adjacent learning
skills.Big Data & Processing: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, partitioning, compression, distributed processing, batch pipelines, performance optimization
skills.Governance & Reliability: Data quality frameworks, monitoring, alerting, observability, troubleshooting, runbooks, regulated banking data controls, access control concepts, audit-friendly documentation
skills.Monitoring / Observability: BMC TrueSight/TSCO, Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM/Introscope, AppDynamics, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, operational dashboards
skills.Delivery: Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Agile/Scrum, technical documentation, stakeholder communication, mentoring, code/design review participation

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic automation pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok/xAI APIs, FAISS, sentence-transformers, and MCP concepts. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, scoring, resume/cover generation, quality gates, and application tracking through structured JSON artifacts and repeatable workflows.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Bedrock, PySpark, and Parquet. Focused on cost-aware data layout, small-file mitigation, metadata/catalog concepts, and analytics-ready datasets.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a forecasting-oriented data product using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to transform telemetry into capacity planning insights and operational dashboards.
